name: career-agent
description: Agentic job application workflow for tailored CVs, cover letters, sourcing, ATS form handoff, and application tracking.

interface.shortDescription: Generate tailored applications and manage a local job pipeline.
interface.longDescription: career-agent helps bootstrap a profile from a CV, source verified roles, scaffold role configs, generate ATS-safe CV and cover letter PDFs, fill supported ATS forms up to a human review boundary, and track application status locally.
defaultPrompt: Set up my career-agent profile from this CV.
Generate a tailored CV for this role.
Review this ATS form before I submit it.
